name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
Small in stock!!️
Tote in a new small size, I've been wanting this bag🌿, slightly shorter than the original small size, looks very elegant😘, retains the delicate cuteness of a small bag while having the large capacity of a big bag, fully meets daily needs🙋🏻‍♀️, classic embroidery, iconic lettering, stylish and versatile with a full vintage vibe🤗
size:26*8*22cm
